# openshift_bmc_boot (Resource)

Mounts a discovery ISO via Redfish virtual media and reboots bare-metal hosts. Use iso_url from openshift_cluster.discovery_iso_url. Supports Dell iDRAC, HPE iLO, Supermicro, and any generic Redfish v1 BMC.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hosts` (Attributes List) List of bare-metal hosts to boot from the ISO. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--hosts))
- `iso_url` (String) URL of the discovery ISO to mount, e.g. openshift_cluster.prod.discovery_iso_url.

### Read-Only

- `booted_hosts` (List of String) Names of hosts successfully booted from the ISO.

<a id="nestedatt--hosts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `hosts`

Required:

- `bmc_address` (String) Base URL of the BMC Redfish endpoint, e.g. https://10.0.0.10 or https://idrac.example.internal.
- `bmc_password` (String, Sensitive) BMC password.
- `bmc_username` (String, Sensitive) BMC username.
- `name` (String) Human-readable name for the host (used in error messages).

Optional:

- `vendor` (String) BMC vendor: auto (detect), dell, hpe, supermicro, generic. Defaults to auto.
